Sri Lanka
Uncovered

10 days of temples, trains, safaris, glamping and turtle beaches. Women-only. Small group. Unforgettable.

From £995per person
£280deposit
10 daysduration
book now →
overview

Why you'll love this trip

Gals, we're going to Sri Lanka! From glamping next to Udawalawe National Park to an early morning hike to one of the best viewpoints in the world — this trip will make you fall head over heels. Women-only. Expert female leader. Max 16 gals.

day by day

Your 10-day adventure

day 1

Welcome to Sri Lanka! 🌴

negombo

Check-in day is yours to enjoy — rest up or head to the beach. Evening: beachfront welcome dinner and drinks at sunset. The most gorgeous start to your adventure!

🌅 Welcome Dinner🏖️ Beach
day 2

Temple Exploring 🛕

sigiriya

Dambulla Cave Temple carved into rock, then the golden hilltop Buddha. Arrive in Sigiriya with stunning rock views — we're climbing it early tomorrow!

🛕 Dambulla Caves🙏 Golden Buddha
day 3 — ⭐ GWT exclusive

Sigiriya Rock + Village Dinner 🪨

sigiriya

Early start to climb Lion Rock — a UNESCO World Heritage site standing nearly 700ft. Worth every step! Evening: exclusive local village bonfire dinner, cooked by the most wonderful hosts.

🪨 UNESCO Site⭐ gwt exclusive
day 4

Kandy & Temple of the Tooth 🦷

kandy

Drive to Kandy, Sri Lanka's cultural capital. Visit the famous Temple of the Sacred Tooth Relic, then enjoy mountain views from your hotel terrace.

🦷 Sacred Temple🏔 Mountain Views
day 5

Tea Plantations + Ella Blue Train 🚂

ella

Tea plantation visit and cooking demo, then board the iconic Ella Blue Train — one of the most beautiful rail journeys in the world. Arrive in Ella with panoramic mountain views from your 4-star hotel balcony.

🍵 Tea Plantation🚂 Ella Blue Train
day 6

Little Adam's Peak & Nine Arches ⛰

ella

Morning hike up Little Adam's Peak for breathtaking views, then the famous Nine Arch Bridge hidden in jungle. Free afternoon to explore Ella's buzzing cafés.

⛰ Little Adam's Peak🌉 Nine Arch Bridge
day 7

Elephant Safari + Eco Glamping 🐘

udawalawe

Udawalawe National Park elephant safari — truly incredible. Then check into our luxury eco glamping site by the Rakwana River. Fall asleep to real jungle sounds.

🐘 Elephant Safari⭐ Eco Glamping
day 8

Galle Fort & Beachside Hotel 🏰

unawatuna

UNESCO Galle Fort — beautiful colonial architecture, boutique shops and incredible food. Check into our beachside hotel just 2 minutes from the ocean.

🏰 Galle Fort🌊 Beachside Hotel
day 9

Turtle Beach & Sundowners 🐢

unawatuna

Swim with sea turtles at Turtle Beach — one of the most magical moments on the whole trip. Free afternoon, then sunset cocktails to celebrate.

🐢 Turtle Beach🌅 Sunset Cocktails
day 10

Goodbye Sri Lanka 😭✈️

Colombo

Final morning to squeeze in a last swim or wander before transferring to Colombo airport. You'll leave completely obsessed — and already planning your next GWT trip.

✈️ Departure Day
where we stay

Hand-picked stays

negombo — Night 1
Beachfront Hotel

A few minutes' walk from Negombo beach — perfect to meet your group and start with the welcome dinner at sunset.

🏖️ beachfrontwifiac
sigiriya — Nights 2–3
Sigiriya Rock Hotel

Close to Pidurangala Rock with great restaurants nearby. Air-conditioned rooms with free WiFi — the perfect base for the big climb.

🪨 rock viewswifiac
kandy — Night 4
Mountain View Hotel

Impressive terrace with mountain views, just minutes from the Temple of the Sacred Tooth Relic. Some rooms have lake or city views!

🏔️ mountain viewsterracewifi
ella — Nights 5–6
4-Star Flower Garden Resort

Perfectly situated next to Little Adam's Peak with panoramic mountain views. Private balcony, free WiFi. Dreamy right!?

⭐ 4-star🏔️ viewsbalcony
udawalawe — Night 7
Luxury Eco Glamping

Responsible luxury eco campsite next to the Rakwana River. Fall asleep to the sounds of wildlife — completely magical.

⭐ gwt exclusive🌿 ecoriverside
unawatuna — Nights 8–9
Beachside Boutique Hotel

Modern and stylish, just a 2-minute walk from the beach. Outdoor pool — whether you prefer beach or pool we've got you covered!

🌊 2 mins beach🏊 poolwifi

reviews

The gals loved it

Honestly, the reviews say it better than we ever could.

★★★★★

“This trip genuinely changed my life. The glamping, the safari, climbing Sigiriya at sunrise — I can't believe this all happened in 10 days. Already planning my next GWT trip!”

S
Sophie T.
Sri Lanka Uncovered, Aug 2025
★★★★★

“Solo traveller and was so nervous, but within 5 minutes I felt completely at home. The local village dinner was the highlight — nothing beats real authentic food around a bonfire.”

faqs

Got questions?

Which airport do I fly into?
Fly into Colombo Airport (Bandaranaike International Airport) — CMB.
Are airport transfers included?
Airport transfers are not included but can be booked through your online account or by emailing info@trutravels.com up to 30 days before departure.
Is it safe to travel to Sri Lanka?
Absolutely! Sri Lanka is a wonderful destination for female travellers and our expert leader is with you throughout the trip.
Will I need a VISA?
Most nationalities require a VISA for Sri Lanka. These are quick and easy to obtain online at www.srilankaevisa.com.
What's the currency?
The Sri Lankan Rupee (LKR). Cards are widely accepted in cities; take some cash for smaller towns.
What level of fitness do I need?
A reasonable level of fitness for Sigiriya Rock and Little Adam's Peak, but we always go at our own pace — nobody gets left behind!
Can I pay in instalments?
Yes! Secure your spot with a £280 deposit, then pay the remainder in flexible instalments up to 10 weeks before departure.
What is the group size?
Maximum 16 gals per group — small enough to feel intimate, big enough to guarantee a brilliant group vibe.
Are meals included?
9 × Breakfasts, 1 × Lunch and 3 × Dinners are included. Sri Lankan food is incredible and very affordable for anything extra!
Who leads the group?
One of our incredible Gals Who Travel leaders! Fully trained, passionate about travel and they'll become your best friend in no time.
